Syzygium jambos is a tropical fruit tree native to Asia, belonging to the family Myrtaceae. The plant is known for its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The bioactive constituents of Syzygium jambos include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant are teas, infusions, and juices, as well as extracts and capsules, which are used to treat various health conditions.
